title: How to apply for a UK Long Range Certificate (LRC)
body: "Please email your application and supporting documents to gmdss@mcga.gov.uk  Please ensure your documents are included as attachments or within a .zip folder. Unfortunately, we cannot open .rar extensions or links to file-sharing services (e.g. OneDrive, Google Drive, Dropbox etc).  Please note: We do not offer a counter service. "
